reviews.review_description: Was great but now I can't even install it!

Have had this app on my 
Go for at least 3 months
and the long reported problem of repeating pixels along the edges has not been fixed.
Also the other " people"
in the theatre are too
bright, as if they are
glowing. Please FIX!

I tried it out last night good one just the beach one is not advisable maybe u can try more movie cinemas . Does the 3d one realy work thou most 3D are double screen  will this app put them together as one  without the blare screen

developer_response.body: Hi we plan to add more sceneries in the future. The 3D does work, you can try it with our 3D videos category !

reviews.review_description: It shows that it's installed but I can't update it . I am trying to open the app and it shows as uninstalled. Same happen with the bait app and other apps. Am I doing something wrong?

developer_response.body:
This looks like an issue with your device rather than our app. We recommend you to contact Oculus support to solve your issue. Also check if you have sufficient space left on your device.
Make sure you rate our app according to your experience *using* it :)

reviews.review_description: Wish the full movies could be shown when's out...

developer_response.body:
Hi thank you very much! 
We definitely want to show full movies in our app, and we are working on it. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I love the app I had it in my last device but somehow I can't download it in my phone can you help

developer_response.body: Hello, can you email us at cinevr@cinemur.fr with the issue you have? We'll be happy to help.

reviews.review_description: The environment lighting is the only feature that made me truly love this app and now it’s gone in this update. Is there any fix to that?

developer_response.body: Thanks for reporting the issue. This is obviously a bug and we've fixed it for the 4.0.2. Make sure you update to the latest version.

reviews.review_description: I suggest that on 3D movies experience should be a bigger screen mode, the reason is I can't really see the 3D mode, screen is looks to small, everything else is Awesome, I love it, highly recommended for those the love vr movies ��

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, we appreciate that! Next release will add new features that may be interesting for you ;-)

reviews.review_title: App crashes after 5 minutes run always
reviews.review_description: App is good but with new update app crashes everytime after 5 minutes run...this never happened with earlier versions.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thanks again for reporting the issue.
Our latest update should fix the crash (v3.1). Make sure you update it, and feel free to email us directly at support@cinevr.io if problem still occurs.

reviews.review_description: Google play movies support please 😊

developer_response.body: Hello, unfortunately we cannot support Google Play movies for legal reasons. But we are working hard to make premium movies a reality soon ;)

reviews.review_title: Not sure what this app is for
reviews.review_description: Maybe i am missing something but really can't see the point of this? You sit in a theatre with loads of other people all talking but watching your own video stream.  If you were all watching the same thing maybe it would be ok, but otherwise unsure what the benefit is?

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We are working on a better social features for later this year. For the moment, we will release very soon a version that will add some new features and a bugfix for audio mute.

reviews.review_description: I thought this app would allow me to watch videos and see photos on my Oculus Go.  It does not.  And all I can see is their trailers.

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
You can actually watch videos stored in folders of your Oculus Go through "Local files" section, and you can access network shares from there (for example on a computer or a NAS). Make sure you have updated to v3.0.

reviews.review_description:
Hi
I'm from Singapore.. I already purchased $699 twice for the popcorn but I still can't get 600 popcorn ..and I can't watch 3d on the cinevr can explain to me why? 
Thanks

developer_response.body: Hi ibnusidek, can you contact us at support@cinevr.io so that we can help you?

reviews.review_description: I think the app idea is good, however lacking features. I think a great future might be an in app browser. Simply a a browser on the big screen allowing us to visit the web with the cinema experience

developer_response.body: Hi we are working on revamping the social part of the app for a version 4.0, so that people can watch content together the right way. Thanks for your patience, and meanwhile, we have updated the app to a v3.0 that brings bugfixes and improvements.

reviews.review_title: Update has ruined the viewing experience
reviews.review_description:
Having been great for watching movies, I've downloaded an update (7/7/20).
The ratio of the screen no longer matches the movies being watched... I'll use something else until it's fixed.

developer_response.body:
Hi kellynio,

CinemaScope videos with 2.35:1 ratio are no longer stretched, update your app with latest version (4.0.1)

Thanks for using CINEVR!

reviews.review_title: How do I rent a movie?
reviews.review_description: I go in to the app only to hear others and that was a tad alarming but I stopped to think about it and I looked around and muted them but I could still be heard. Invasion of privacy much? I also can NOT watch any movies! I can only watch the trailer! How do I get the movie and watch it in 3 D?

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Voice mute is a known bug that is fixed in the next version we will release very soon.
For the moment we provide trailers but you can watch your own videos available on your device (in the Local videos menu).

reviews.review_description: It's not installing  when I tap on install.  Not sure why it's doing it. The app is in "not installed" section of my gear vr. any suggestions ?
Pay for 1400 popcorn and when I go to rent a movie it says I have no popcorn

developer_response.body: I would recommend to use CINEVR on Meta Quest, which is fully supported. You can buy popcorns on our website cinevr.io.

reviews.review_description: Keeps spinning saying waiting to connect to server. Never connects.
Hi whenever I watch movie its exits automatically and go back to home page after 10 mnts ..

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We have fixed the crash you experienced in v3.1 of the app. Make sure you update it, and feel free to contact us a support@cinevr.io if problem persists.
